title: stachys kurdica subsp. kurdica
intro: Stachys kurdica subsp. kurdica, also known as Kurdish betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as stomach ulcers and diarrhea, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kurdish betony include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and even exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Kurdish betony can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
